scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key components accurately: ContainerPath, LocalPath, PathProtocol, ensure_contents signature and return value, RelativePathError, PebbleConnectionError. mode default of 0o644 matches gold standard's 420. Additional details (is_file, is_dir, owner, group methods) are plausible pathlib-like extensions.
scores.hallucination_notes: Claims '** wildcard is unsupported' — this specific negative assertion about recursive glob is not in the gold standard and cannot be verified; it may be fabricated. Also lists owner()/group() methods on ContainerPath not mentioned in gold standard, though these are plausible for a pathlib-like interface.
